message:
feat(workflows): enhance workflow execution with approval integration

Extend workflow system to support approval-gated actions:

workflows.rs:
- Integrate ApprovalStore for RequireApproval policy results
- Add workflow step approval state tracking
- Support for approval tokens in workflow context
- Enhanced error handling with WA-5xxx codes
- Workflow audit logging via AuditActionRecord

ingest.rs:
- Pass workspace context to approval checks
- Handle approval-required responses in ingest flow

wezterm.rs:
- Add approval token forwarding to WezTerm CLI calls
- Support approval bypass for pre-approved actions

patterns.rs:
- Minor adjustment for approval context propagation

main.rs:
- Wire up approval store initialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -641,7 +641,7 @@ fn builtin_codex_pack() -> PatternPack {
                 severity: Severity::Info,
                 anchors: vec!["Token usage:".to_string()],
                 regex: Some(
-                    r"total=(?P<total>[\d,]+)\s+input=(?P<input>[\d,]+)\s+\(\+\s*(?P<cached>[\d,]+)\s+cached\)\s+output=(?P<output>[\d,]+)(?:\s+\(reasoning\s+(?P<reasoning>[\d,]+)\))?".to_string()
+                    r"total=(?P<total>[\d,]+)\s+input=(?P<input>[\d,]+)(?:\s+\(\+\s*(?P<cached>[\d,]+)\s+cached\))?\s+output=(?P<output>[\d,]+)(?:\s+\(reasoning\s+(?P<reasoning>[\d,]+)\))?".to_string()
                 ),
                 description: "Codex session token usage summary".to_string(),
                 remediation: None,
